\tzpentry{ID5663}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5663 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ u_{\mathrm{mag}}(\mathbf{r},t) = \frac{1}{2\mu_0}\,\mathbf{B}(\mathbf{r},t)\cdot\mathbf{B}(\mathbf{r},t)\,, \]
